summary: Completed testing of WayofDojo Adult Journey (Samouraï Confirmé) gamification feature. Fixed critical JWT signature mismatch bug in adult-journey API. All core features working: login with premium user shows adult mode, rank display (Bushi/2500 XP), Musashi daily quote with Japanese/romaji/French, Japan map with 9 cities, mission cards with 3 types (technique/stratégie/intérieure), choice selection with feedback, and Maître Tanaka mentor.

minor.issue: Duplicate mission check not working - missions stored in gamification.adultJourneyMissions but check looks in progress.adultJourney.completedMissions

action_items: Fix duplicate mission detection - ensure completedMissions array is properly read from database before checking duplicates
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: JWT signature mismatch - adult-journey API was using different JWT_SECRET than auth.ts. Changed to use verifyToken from @/lib/auth
Data files well-structured: quotes.ts (15 Musashi quotes), journey.ts (9 cities, 27 missions, 5 ranks)
AdultJourneyWidget correctly conditionally renders for samourai_confirme profile
Mission card expansion with AnimatePresence works correctly
City selector shows locked cities with 🔒 icon based on unlock requirements
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing premium user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adult Journey gamification tested. JWT bug fixed. 12/13 backend tests pass. Frontend fully working: login shows 'Mode Samouraï Confirmé', Bushi rank with XP, daily Musashi quote, Japan map with 9 cities, 3 mission types with choices/feedback, Tanaka mentor. Minor issue: duplicate mission check not preventing re-completion.

bug_fixed.issue: JWT signature mismatch causing 'Erreur serveur' on adult-journey API
bug_fixed.root_cause: adult-journey/route.ts used JWT_SECRET='wayofdojo-secret-key-2024' while auth.ts used NEXTAUTH_SECRET='your-super-secret-key'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed adult-journey API to import and use verifyToken from @/lib/auth instead of direct jwt.verify
